description: Discussion on music NFTs, creator coins, and the evolution of Coop Records, a crypto record label. The platform allows users to buy and sell music as coins, requiring approval from artists and labels for ownership rights. [t=0:32] [t=39:84] [t=57:97]
topic_summary: Exploration of music NFTs and creator coins through Coop Records, focusing on the platform's functionality and market evolution since its launch two years ago. [t=0:32] [t=78:21]
